title: Evidence Junction Object Schema
description: Schema for Evidence Junction objects connecting Session and Frame objects with teaser quotes

id.description: Unique identifier for this evidence junction

session_id.description: ID of the Session being analyzed

frame_id.description: ID of the Frame being applied to the session

teaser_quote.description: The most compelling quote or finding from this session-frame combination

quote_attribution.description: Source attribution for the teaser quote (participant, timestamp, etc.)

evidence_summary.description: Brief summary of key evidence points from this session-frame analysis

strategic_insights.description: Array of strategic insights generated by applying this frame to the session

relevance_score.description: How relevant this session is to the frame

analysis_notes.description: Additional notes from the researcher about this analysis

key_findings.description: Specific findings that emerged from this session-frame combination

follow_up_questions.description: Questions that emerged from this analysis for future research

tags.description: System-derived tags from DUX scan (not manually added)
